prompt: Create a vertical cinematic surreal luxury football poster featuring a confident male football legend seated front-facing on a massive floating throne made entirely from polished chrome soccer balls and gold World Cup-style trophies. The subject sits confidently with both hands resting on the throne arms, wearing a long dark navy double-breasted overcoat, black zip hoodie, dark trousers, white socks, and red-white-black high-top sneakers; use a centered heroic pose, full body visible, realistic proportions, and a deliberately anonymized/blurred face area. The throne is suspended high above a packed stadium at night, with exactly 11 visible ball or trophy elements around the seat: 6 large chrome soccer balls forming the back, sides, and lower base; 2 gold trophy cups behind the shoulders; and 3 floating gold soccer balls in the air. Add exactly 2 glowing holographic tactical-board panels, one on the upper left and one on the upper right, each showing soccer formation diagrams with X and O markers, arrows, and pitch outlines in cyan neon. The background should show a dramatic blue-and-magenta stormy sky, stadium floodlights, red and cyan laser beams crossing upward, a bright football pitch far below, fog and smoke at the bottom, and cheering crowd silhouettes waving exactly 4 visible flags in the foreground. At the bottom, place huge metallic 3D block title text reading THE LEGACY, centered, silver chrome with gold edging, dark shadow, and a premium sports-poster finish. Visual style: ultra-detailed glossy 3D realism, luxury advertising, high contrast teal and crimson lighting, reflective metal surfaces, volumetric fog, epic scale, sharp focus on the seated figure and throne, poster composition, no logos, no watermark, no extra readable text.
